title: Saved Schedule Definitions
subtitle: Run recurring commands on explicit assets and groups
name: Name
noSchedulesDesc: Create a schedule to run a recurring command on explicit assets or a group.
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this schedule?
cronHelp: Five-field cron in UTC; prefix CRON_TZ=Area/City to use an IANA timezone
configOnlyNotice: Enabled schedules run through the durable queue on connected agent assets only. Current policy, creator access, and maintenance guardrails are checked again before every command; commands are never simulated or run locally by the hub.
